name: Barbecued Tofu, Down-Home
recipeIngredient: 1 pound lowfat extra firm tofu, drained
1 teaspoon chipotle pepper in adobo (or 1/4 tsp ground chipotle chile or cayenne pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the tofu between layers of kitchen cloth with a 1-pound weight on top.
2. Line a broiling pan with aluminum foil. Set the oven rack about 5 inches from the broiling element and preheat the broiler.
3. Prepare the barbecue sauce by blending all the remaining ingredients together.
4. Unwrap the tofu and cut into 9 slices, each about 1/2 inch thick.
5. Dip the slices into the sauce to coat both sides.
6. Broil the tofu until flecked with dark brown spots, 4-6 minutes.
7. Turn the tofu over and slather any remaining sauce on the second side. Broil until deeply browned, 4-6 more minutes.
